comments.body: Claiming a narrow #91 first brick from current `fork/main` (`a60fad663`). Scope: inspect the existing abstract `HPzBridge` declarations and adjacent `Section5StrictData`/`BetaCurveInput` consumers, then add focused source/doc audit coverage for the current bridge surface and the still-missing in-tree per-`z` supplier. This will not claim that the matching/Hensel data has been constructed in the live Section 5 context or that `hPz` is discharged.

Pushed the first narrow #91 audit brick to `main`: `4c5434f6d` (`autosync: ArkLib updates`).

What changed:
- Added source audit coverage for the abstract `hPz` datum:
  - `ArkLib.HPzBridge.HenselDatum`
- Added source audit coverage for the GS-factor / Section 5 consumer surface:
  - `ArkLib.GSFactorData.Bundle`
  - `ArkLib.GSFactorData.of_section5Inputs`
  - `ArkLib.GSFactorData.toSection5StrictData`
- Added source audit coverage for the betaRec / `hPz` consumer front doors in `KeystoneStrictResidual.lean`:
  - `BetaCurveInput`, `BetaCurveInputFin`
  - `hcoeffPoly_of_betaRec`, `hcoeffPoly_of_betaRecFin`
  - `strictCoeffPolysResidual_of_betaRec`, `strictCoeffPolysResidual_of_betaRecFin`
  - `correlatedAgreement_affine_curves_johnson_of_betaRecFin`
  - `correlatedAgreement_affine_curves_johnson_of_section5DataFin_strict`
- Updated the #61 disposition note to call out #91 explicitly: `HPzBridge` has the abstract `HenselDatum -> hPz` and direct-identity landing pads, but live Section 5 still has to construct the per-`z` datum or matching-unique witness and thread it through `GSFactorData.toSection5StrictData` / `BetaCurveInput`.

Validation:
- `git diff --check` passed on the touched files.
- Line-start executable forbidden-token/native-decision scan was clean for the three touched Lean files.
- Anchor search confirmed all new audit lines and the #91 note are present.
- `fork/main` contains `4c5434f6d`.
- Focused `timeout 240 lake env lean ArkLib/ToMathlib/HPzBridge.lean` was attempted, but stopped before source because `ArkLib/ToMathlib/CorrelatedAgreementListDecodingClosed.olean` is missing in the shared cache.

Leaving #91 open: this does not construct the live per-`z` Hensel/matching data or discharge `hPz`; it only makes the current bridge and consumer surfaces auditable.

Claiming a narrow #91 reduced-surface audit follow-up from current `fork/main` (`9e4fe0428`). Scope: audit the current `HenselDatumProducer` front doors (`SepHenselInput`, `henselDatum_of_sepInput`, `hPz_of_sepHenselInput`, and the matching-divisibility adapter) and update the #61/#91 disposition note to reflect that the live remaining work is producing `SepHenselInput` plus degree bounds in Section 5. This is audit/regression/docs only; it will not claim `hPz` is instantiated.

Pushed the #91 reduced-surface audit brick to `main`: `f45739fb8` (`docs(#91): audit Hensel datum producer surface`).

What changed:
- Added source audit coverage in `ArkLib/ToMathlib/HenselDatumProducer.lean` for the current reduced supplier front doors:
  - `ArkLib.HenselDatumProducer.SepHenselInput`
  - `ArkLib.HenselDatumProducer.eval_sub_mem_span_X_of_congr`
  - `ArkLib.HenselDatumProducer.approxRoot_of_isRoot_of_congr`
  - `ArkLib.HenselDatumProducer.isUnit_derivative_eval_of_separable`
  - `ArkLib.HenselDatumProducer.isUnit_derivative_of_separable_of_isRoot_of_congr`
  - `ArkLib.HenselDatumProducer.henselDatum_of_sepInput`
  - `ArkLib.hPz_of_sepHenselInput`
  - `ArkLib.HenselDatumProducer.henselDatum_of_matchingDvd_and_sep`
- Updated the #61/#91 disposition note to record the live reduced route as `SepHenselInput -> HenselDatum -> hPz`, with the matching-divisibility adapter, and to spell out that the remaining Section 5 work is still to produce the per-`z` `SepHenselInput`/matching-unique witness plus degree bounds.

Validation:
- `git diff --check` passed.
- Line-start forbidden-token scan for `sorry`/`admit`/`axiom`/`native_decide` was clean on the touched files.
- Anchor search confirmed the new audit lines and disposition note text.
- `fork/main` now resolves to `f45739fb83c803fdb8c54efdc874fd749ddec3ca`.

No build was run for this docs/source-audit-only brick, per the request to avoid builds unless needed. Leaving #91 open: this does not instantiate live Section 5 `hPz`; it just makes the current producer surface auditable for the next proof brick.

Claiming a narrow #91 proof-gap-index sync from current `fork/main`. Scope: add a central routing row in `docs/kb/audits/ARKLIB-PROOF-GAP-INDEX-2026-06-06.md` for the live `hPz` / `SepHenselInput -> HenselDatum -> hPz` supplier residual. This is docs/routing only; it will not touch the Section 5 source files or claim the per-`z` data is constructed.

Pushed a narrow #91 proof-gap-index sync to `main`: `1f0d26ad2` (`docs(#91): index hPz supplier residual`).

What changed:
- Added a central routing row in `docs/kb/audits/ARKLIB-PROOF-GAP-INDEX-2026-06-06.md` for the live `hPz` supplier residual:
  - `BCIKS20 Section 5 hPz supplier from per-z Hensel/matching data` -> #91
- This points the broad #61 betaRec/hcoeffPoly capstone to the reduced `SepHenselInput -> HenselDatum -> hPz` supplier surface without touching the Section 5 source files.

Validation:
- `git diff --check HEAD^ HEAD -- docs/kb/audits/ARKLIB-PROOF-GAP-INDEX-2026-06-06.md` passed before push.
- Anchor search confirms the new `#91` / `hPz` row is present.
- `fork/main` contains `1f0d26ad2`.

Leaving #91 open: this is docs/routing coverage only. The live per-`z` Hensel/matching data and degree-bound supplier still has to be constructed.

Claiming a narrow #91 source bridge from current `fork/main`. Scope: add the direct matching-divisibility landing theorem in `ArkLib/ToMathlib/HenselDatumProducer.lean`, wrapping the existing `henselDatum_of_matchingDvd_and_sep` adapter plus degree bounds into the full `hPz` field. This will not construct the live Section 5 per-`z` matching data; it just makes the matching-divisibility route consume-ready for the actual supplier brick.

**Audit pass — 2026-06-06.** NOT finished.

The abstract bridge IS proven (`hPz_of_henselDatum`, `eval_identity_of_henselDatum`, `HPzBridge.lean`, axiom-clean), but `hPz` is still an open field of `structure Section5StrictData` (`CorrelatedAgreementListDecodingClosed.lean:126`); the live builders (`BetaInputSupply.lean` :314/:407) fill it via `hPz_of_henselDatum (hHensel P) (hdegPz P)` while taking `hHensel`/`SepHenselInput`/`hdegPz` as hypotheses. `GSFactorData.toSection5StrictData` also takes `hPz` as an argument.

Remaining: construct `HPzBridge.HenselDatum u P v₀ v₁` per `z ∈ RS_goodCoeffsCurve` from the §5 matching/separability/congruence data (or the MatchingExtractor single-root route via `hPz_of_eval_identity`), with the degree bounds, and wire into the `Section5StrictData`/`BetaCurveInput` builders without assuming the per-`z` identity. Child of #61.

Pushed a narrow #91 source bridge to `main`: `76f5894d8` (`feat(#91): package matching hPz supplier`).

What changed:
- Added `ArkLib.HenselDatumProducer.MatchingDvdInput`, a bundled per-`z` matching-divisibility input surface carrying the two linear-factor divisibility facts, the common approximation congruences, and separability.
- Added `ArkLib.HenselDatumProducer.henselDatum_of_matchingDvdInput`, wrapping the existing `henselDatum_of_matchingDvd_and_sep` adapter.
- Added `ArkLib.hPz_of_matchingDvdInput`, the direct landing theorem from `MatchingDvdInput` plus the representative degree bounds to the full `hPz` field via `HPzBridge.hPz_of_henselDatum`.
- Updated the #61/#91 disposition note so the matching-divisibility route is recorded as `MatchingDvdInput -> HenselDatum -> hPz`.
- Added `#print axioms` audit anchors for the new declarations.

Validation:
- `git diff --check HEAD^ HEAD` passed after final rebase.
- `python3 scripts/forbidden_tokens.py ArkLib/ToMathlib/HenselDatumProducer.lean` passed before commit.
- `python3 scripts/sorry_census.py --root .` reports `holes: 0`.
- Focused Lean check passed after refreshing missing shared-cache imports: `LEAN_PATH=... lean ArkLib/ToMathlib/HenselDatumProducer.lean`. The new audit lines report only `[propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]`.

Leaving #91 open: this packages the matching-divisibility supplier route, but the live Section 5 context still has to construct the per-`z` `MatchingDvdInput`/`SepHenselInput` witnesses and degree bounds.
